content.problemStatement:
For a sequence of integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč, let G(A)G(A)G(A) denote a graph with NNN nodes (numbered 111 through NNN) such that for each pair of distinct nodes iii and jjj, there is an undirected edge between these nodes if and only if Ai‚čÖAjA_i \cdot A_jAi‚Äč‚čÖAj‚Äč is a perfect square.

You are given a graph with NNN nodes (numbered 111 through NNN) and an integer KKK. Find the number of integer sequences  A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč such that 1‚Č§Ai‚Č§K1 \le A_i \le K1‚Č§Ai‚Äč‚Č§K for each valid iii and the given graph is a subgraph of G(A)G(A)G(A). Since this number might be very large, compute it modulo 998,244,353998,244,353998,244,353.

Note that the graph is described in an unusual way ‚Äē you are given MMM non-intersecting ranges [L1,R1],[L2,R2],‚Ä¶,[LM,RM][L_1, R_1], [L_2, R_2], \ldots, [L_M, R_M][L1‚Äč,R1‚Äč],[L2‚Äč,R2‚Äč],‚Ä¶,[LM‚Äč,RM‚Äč] and for each valid iii, the graph contains undirected edges between nodes LiL_iLi‚Äč and Li+1L_i + 1Li‚Äč+1, between nodes Li+1L_i + 1Li‚Äč+1 and Li+2L_i + 2Li‚Äč+2, and so on up to an edge between nodes Ri‚ąí1R_i - 1Ri‚Äč‚ąí1 and RiR_iRi‚Äč.

Notes:


An integer XXX is a perfect square if there is an integer YYY such that X‚ÄČ=‚ÄČY2X‚ÄČ=‚ÄČY^2X‚ÄČ=‚ÄČY2.
A simple graph BBB with NNN nodes is a subgraph of a simple graph AAA with NNN identically numbered nodes if for each valid pair of nodes uuu and vvv connected by an edge in BBB, there is also an edge connecting nodes uuu and vvv in AAA. Refer to the following animation for more clarity:
constraints: 1‚Č§Li<Ri‚Č§N1 \le L_i \lt R_i \le N1‚Č§Li‚Äč<Ri‚Äč‚Č§N for each valid iii
Ri‚ąíLi+1‚Č§105R_i - L_i + 1 \le 10^5Ri‚Äč‚ąíLi‚Äč+1‚Č§105 for each valid iii
Ri‚ąí1<LiR_{i - 1} \lt L_iRi‚ąí1‚Äč<Li‚Äč for each valid iii
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains three space-separated integers NNN, KKK and MMM.
MMM lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains two space-separated integers LiL_iLi‚Äč and RiR_iRi‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: Print a single line containing one integer ‚Äē the number of valid sequences modulo 998,244,353998,244,353998,244,353.
